meaning: n.[遗传]因子,[遗传]基因 Gene 吉恩(男子名)
examples: The gene for asthma has been identified.
The gene is activated by a specific protein.
The gene is only part of the causation of illness.
The raw output of those sequencing machines is a chaotic pile of gene fragments.
It could be a gene that, defective in some way, predisposes a person to disease.
